reviewTrigger: Public export, SDK, API, docs runtime, versioning, or release-stage change

journeys.startingState: Clean checkout with frozen Bun dependencies installed.
inputs: Repository calculator fixtures and canonical rule inputs
journeys.stepsOrProcedureOwner: bun run test; the retained test-check detail must name @taxkit/calculators as an executed workspace task
expectedBehavior: Calculator assertions produce the schema-backed tax results owned by the package.
preservedInvariants: No registry, provider, publication, or deployment operation.
journeys.oracle: The package tests exercise the public calculator implementation rather than an imitation fixture.
evidence: The test-check detail in the retained release attempt, including the @taxkit/calculators task outcome.
nonClaims: Local calculation tests do not prove a published package or external consumer.

journeys.boundary: Dist-only tarball and public SDK export paths
journeys.startingState: Clean checkout with SDK build inputs available.
journeys.stepsOrProcedureOwner: bun run --filter=@taxkit/sdk check-packed-artifact then bun run --filter=@taxkit/sdk validate:downstream
expectedBehavior: The dist-only tarball installs and every supported public entrypoint imports in the downstream consumer.
expectedSideEffects: Transient tarballs and a command-owned temporary consumer workspace.
preservedInvariants: Tarballs are deleted by their owning command and are never durable release evidence.
journeys.oracle: The consumer installs the actual packed artifact rather than importing workspace source.
journeys.environment: Local TaxKit checkout and isolated temporary consumer
evidence: Packed-artifact and downstream-consumer detail digests in the retained release attempt.
nonClaims: No npm publication, registry state, or external install is established.

journeys.boundary: Standalone local API health, metadata, calculation, schema failure, and OpenAPI contract
journeys.startingState: The standalone API app can start from the clean checkout.
inputs: Package-owned HTTP smoke requests and OpenAPI snapshot
expectedBehavior: Health, metadata, successful calculation, schema-error, and OpenAPI checks match the owning HTTP Schemas.
expectedSideEffects: An ephemeral local API process only.
preservedInvariants: No provider or deployed endpoint access.
journeys.oracle: The package-owned smoke client decodes real local HTTP responses with the canonical Schemas.
evidence: The api-smoke detail digest in the retained release attempt.
nonClaims: No deployed API or production behavior is established.

journeys.boundary: Local docs content, render, navigation, server-function, recoverable-error, and console behavior
journeys.startingState: Docs dependencies and the repository browser runtime are available locally.
journeys.stepsOrProcedureOwner: bun run docs:validate then bun run --filter=docs test:browser
expectedBehavior: Local rendering, navigation, server functions, recoverable errors, and console cleanliness match the repository-owned fixtures.
expectedSideEffects: Local build and browser artifacts only.
preservedInvariants: No network publication or deployed-site mutation.
journeys.oracle: The local browser harness observes route behavior and error/console states rather than a static snapshot alone.
evidence: The docs-validation and docs-browser detail digests in the retained release attempt.
nonClaims: Local browser proof does not establish deployed SSR, hydration, production behavior, or public availability.

journeys.boundary: One ordered local release-readiness attempt and its sanitized retained details
journeys.startingState: A candidate checkout has an exact base commit, changed-content digest, and pending Changesets state.
expectedBehavior: All nine checks execute once in order and success is reported only with true zero exits and addressable sanitized detail digests.
expectedSideEffects: Ignored command-owned sanitized detail files under tmp/release-readiness only.
preservedInvariants: Presentation never reruns a completed or failed attempt.
Failed and inconclusive provenance is retained.
journeys.oracle: The runtime decodes the inventory and proof packet at filesystem ingress, preserves true terminal states, and rejects missing or mismatched evidence.
evidence: The release attempt detail paths/digests and candidate proof packet.
nonClaims: Local closure is not approval for a tag, release, npm publication, deployment, provider access, or public availability.
